utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 
- health_coverage: Specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plans and explicit monthly costs (€100 and €65) and a total health cost (€165/month). Costs are present; thus fully specified.
- property_coverage: Provides home/contents insurance with named plan and cost (€60/month) and some coverage details; costs present, so specified.
- travel_coverage: Provides travel insurance with named plan and cost (€50/month) and coverage details; costs present, so specified.
- additional_services: Lists enhancement services with cost (€80/month); specified.
- total_budget: Provides complete monthly (€355/month) and annual (€4,260/year) cost breakdown and additional budget context; specified.
All 5 items are present and include the required details, particularly costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each product named in the final coverage plan and match exactly to the corresponding item in the ground-truth list. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for property/home contents, InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel insurance, and Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on which corresponds to Adventure Travel Coverage under travel enhancement services. Retrieve each of their ratings from the ground-truth and map them.
